Text: Before you scroll, this one saves interviews.
Day four of turning you into a pattern first thinker.
They give you ranges, meetings, time slots, schedules.
And then they ask, can these overlap?
Nested loops, messy logic, instant rejection.
If it doesn't, close the window.
Overlapping means next start is less than or equal to current end.
Merging means update the end to the maximum.
This turns your solution into O of N log N for sorting
and O of N for the scan.
Merge intervals, meeting rooms, insert interval,
Once you see intervals as windows,
half the problem is already solved.
